privileged_info_summary: The task modifies a real GPX dataset (fells_loop.gpx) of the Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts. The task requires exporting an annotated GPX file to the exact path 'C:\workspace\output\annotated_fells.gpx'. The required waypoint annotations contain specific exact phrases: 'Field station alpha', 'Soil sample FS-001', 'Field station beta', and 'IMG_2847'. The verifier enforces a bounding box check (lat: 42.4 to 42.5, lon: -71.2 to -71.0) which correctly acts as a safe outer envelope for all original waypoints in the fells_loop.gpx dataset.
